title: matthiola fruticulosa var. lateritia
intro: Matthiola fruticulosa var. lateritia, also known as the purple rock stock, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Matthiola fruticulosa var. lateritia include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various methods of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
